---
title: "Transcript Counts across FL Filter Levels"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.align="center"}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, results='hide', fig.pos = "h", fig.align = "center")

library(grid)
library(ggthemes)
library(ggpubr)
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)

r_source_dir <- if (dir.exists("R")) "R" else "src/plotting/R"

source(file.path(r_source_dir, "01_config.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "02_themes.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "04_data_loading.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "09_filter_level_lines.R"))
```


```{r check-paths}
check_paths(src_dirs)
```


```{r load-data}
tool_titles <- c(
  IsoQuant      = "IsoQuant",
  FLAIR         = "FLAIR",
  TALON         = "TALON",
  Bambu         = "Bambu",
  Mandalorion   = "Mandalorion",
  isoseq_sqanti = "IsoSeq + SQANTI3"
)

all_line_data <- list()
all_bar_data  <- list()

for (platform in names(src_dirs)) {
  all_line_data[[platform]] <- list()
  all_bar_data[[platform]]  <- list()
  for (method in names(src_dirs[[platform]])) {
    cat(platform, method, "\n")
    src_dir <- src_dirs[[platform]][[method]]
    paths <- get_paths(src_dir)
    df_lists <- load_df_lists(paths)

    all_line_data[[platform]][[method]] <- list(
      brain  = build_filter_level_data(df_lists, "brain",  simplify = TRUE),
      kidney = build_filter_level_data(df_lists, "kidney", simplify = TRUE)
    )
    all_bar_data[[platform]][[method]] <- list(
      brain  = build_filter_level_data(df_lists, "brain",  simplify = FALSE),
      kidney = build_filter_level_data(df_lists, "kidney", simplify = FALSE)
    )
  }
}
```


```{r brain-filter-level-lines, fig.width=18, fig.height=12}
if (!dir.exists("plot_creation")) {
  dir.create("plot_creation")
}

ylim_by_platform <- c(IsoSeq = 90000, ONT = 65000)

brain_line_plots <- list()
for (platform in names(all_line_data)) {
  brain_line_plots[[platform]] <- list()
  for (method in names(all_line_data[[platform]])) {
    title <- tool_titles[[method]]
    if (is.na(title)) title <- method
    brain_line_plots[[platform]][[method]] <- create_filter_level_line_plot(
      all_line_data[[platform]][[method]][["brain"]], title,
      ylim_max = ylim_by_platform[[platform]]
    )
  }
}

brain_figure <- assemble_filter_level_figure(
  brain_line_plots,
  title = "Transcripts per structural category across FL filters; brain"
)

ggsave("plot_creation/brain_filter_level_lines.pdf",
       device = cairo_pdf, plot = brain_figure,
       width = 18, height = 12, unit = "in")

brain_figure
```


```{r talon-fsm-numbers, results='markup'}
bind_rows(
  all_line_data$IsoSeq$TALON$brain  %>% mutate(platform = "IsoSeq", tissue = "brain"),
  all_line_data$IsoSeq$TALON$kidney %>% mutate(platform = "IsoSeq", tissue = "kidney"),
  all_line_data$ONT$TALON$brain     %>% mutate(platform = "ONT",    tissue = "brain"),
  all_line_data$ONT$TALON$kidney    %>% mutate(platform = "ONT",    tissue = "kidney")
) %>%
  filter(category == "FSM") %>%
  select(platform, tissue, strategy, fl_filter, n_transcripts) %>%
  arrange(platform, tissue, strategy, fl_filter) %>%
  print(n = Inf)
```


```{r kidney-filter-level-lines, fig.width=18, fig.height=12}
kidney_line_plots <- list()
for (platform in names(all_line_data)) {
  kidney_line_plots[[platform]] <- list()
  for (method in names(all_line_data[[platform]])) {
    title <- tool_titles[[method]]
    if (is.na(title)) title <- method
    kidney_line_plots[[platform]][[method]] <- create_filter_level_line_plot(
      all_line_data[[platform]][[method]][["kidney"]], title,
      ylim_max = ylim_by_platform[[platform]]
    )
  }
}

kidney_figure <- assemble_filter_level_figure(
  kidney_line_plots,
  title = "Transcripts per structural category across FL filters; kidney"
)

ggsave("plot_creation/kidney_filter_level_lines.pdf",
       device = cairo_pdf, plot = kidney_figure,
       width = 18, height = 12, unit = "in")

kidney_figure
```


```{r brain-filter-level-bars, fig.width=22, fig.height=14}
brain_bar_plots <- list()
for (platform in names(all_bar_data)) {
  brain_bar_plots[[platform]] <- list()
  for (method in names(all_bar_data[[platform]])) {
    title <- tool_titles[[method]]
    if (is.na(title)) title <- method
    brain_bar_plots[[platform]][[method]] <- create_filter_level_bar_plot(
      all_bar_data[[platform]][[method]][["brain"]], title
    )
  }
}

brain_bar_figure <- assemble_filter_level_bar_figure(
  brain_bar_plots,
  title = "Transcripts per structural category across FL filters; brain"
)

ggsave("plot_creation/brain_filter_level_bars.pdf",
       device = cairo_pdf, plot = brain_bar_figure,
       width = 22, height = 14, unit = "in")

brain_bar_figure
```


```{r kidney-filter-level-bars, fig.width=22, fig.height=14}
kidney_bar_plots <- list()
for (platform in names(all_bar_data)) {
  kidney_bar_plots[[platform]] <- list()
  for (method in names(all_bar_data[[platform]])) {
    title <- tool_titles[[method]]
    if (is.na(title)) title <- method
    kidney_bar_plots[[platform]][[method]] <- create_filter_level_bar_plot(
      all_bar_data[[platform]][[method]][["kidney"]], title
    )
  }
}

kidney_bar_figure <- assemble_filter_level_bar_figure(
  kidney_bar_plots,
  title = "Transcripts per structural category across FL filters; kidney"
)

ggsave("plot_creation/kidney_filter_level_bars.pdf",
       device = cairo_pdf, plot = kidney_bar_figure,
       width = 22, height = 14, unit = "in")

kidney_bar_figure
```


```{r brain-filter-level-pct-bars, fig.width=22, fig.height=14}
brain_pct_bar_plots <- list()
for (platform in names(all_bar_data)) {
  brain_pct_bar_plots[[platform]] <- list()
  for (method in names(all_bar_data[[platform]])) {
    title <- tool_titles[[method]]
    if (is.na(title)) title <- method
    brain_pct_bar_plots[[platform]][[method]] <- create_filter_level_pct_bar_plot(
      all_bar_data[[platform]][[method]][["brain"]], title
    )
  }
}

brain_pct_bar_figure <- assemble_filter_level_bar_figure(
  brain_pct_bar_plots,
  title = "% transcripts per structural category across FL filters; brain"
)

ggsave("plot_creation/brain_filter_level_pct_bars.pdf",
       device = cairo_pdf, plot = brain_pct_bar_figure,
       width = 22, height = 14, unit = "in")

brain_pct_bar_figure
```


```{r kidney-filter-level-pct-bars, fig.width=22, fig.height=14}
kidney_pct_bar_plots <- list()
for (platform in names(all_bar_data)) {
  kidney_pct_bar_plots[[platform]] <- list()
  for (method in names(all_bar_data[[platform]])) {
    title <- tool_titles[[method]]
    if (is.na(title)) title <- method
    kidney_pct_bar_plots[[platform]][[method]] <- create_filter_level_pct_bar_plot(
      all_bar_data[[platform]][[method]][["kidney"]], title
    )
  }
}

kidney_pct_bar_figure <- assemble_filter_level_bar_figure(
  kidney_pct_bar_plots,
  title = "% transcripts per structural category across FL filters; kidney"
)

ggsave("plot_creation/kidney_filter_level_pct_bars.pdf",
       device = cairo_pdf, plot = kidney_pct_bar_figure,
       width = 22, height = 14, unit = "in")

kidney_pct_bar_figure
```
